text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... this cuisine has quite a distinctive
appearance, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! This restaurant's decor is bizarre in its
own right, but the food is even more... How do I
put it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bowl of what can only be described as black tar
bubbles away before me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This all started with an invitation Mejiro Ardan
extended as we were on our way back from an
excursion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, Fine and I have plans to meet at a
restaurant shortly. You're quite welcome to join
us for the meal if you like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I was led to a strikingly eerie
restaurant with a sign outside reading "Taste of
Darkness - Sombre Totale."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you once again for treating me to that
delicious ramen the other day, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I had hoped to treat you to a memorable experience as a show of gratitude—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And you've picked the right place! I can definitely
see us making some grand memories here! This is
my first visit, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm pleased to hear that... I must admit I'm
somewhat inexperienced when it comes to dining
out with friends.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let's make the absolute most of
today!
Pardon me, but would you mind ladling some of
that into those bowls?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do take care. Within the soup, there appears to
be—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Bloop! Sploosh!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Something tentacular. ...My apologies. I ought
to have warned you sooner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But soup ingredients aren't supposed to move?!
Even while scared out of my wits, I somehow
manage to serve up the soup for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Now, let's see how it tastes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall try some as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweating bullets, I bring a solid chunk toward my
lips. Chaos incarnate sits between my chopsticks.
Is this fish? Meat? Some sort of pudding?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's like the chef combined every flavor in
existence into a single mouthful. My tongue goes
numb. Darkness consumes me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: W-wow?! ...This flavor's something else! Amazing! I have never tasted anything like this before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Against all odds, Fine Motion seems to be
enjoying it. But this flavor... I struggle against it
for as long as I can, then just as I'm about to put
down my chopsticks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clink.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I see... So this is the "taste of darkness"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the corner of my eye, I see that Mejiro
Ardan has finished every last drop of her soup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It was... unique. Its flavor was something akin to
that of herbal medicine, health foods, things of
that nature...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That said, I'm rather used to such tastes. Yes, I
hardly realized how quickly I was getting through
it.
choice_data_list: I-I'm going to finish mine too!
I-I'm going to finish mine too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That said, I'm rather used to such tastes. Yes, I
hardly realized how quickly I was getting through
it.
choice_data_list: I-I'm going to finish mine too!
I-I'm going to finish mine too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Tough... you say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hehe, I apologize. It's just quite a surprise to
hear that word and my name in the same breath.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But to hear myself described as such... It makes
me rewarded for having tasted all those different
medicines over the years.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It just goes to show that even the strangest of
flavors have their upsides!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Hehe. It might be nice to have more
adventures like this, from time to time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I think of the soup as an herbal concoction, I
think I can do it! Taking my chopsticks in hand, I
continue eating...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And feel like... I grow a tiny bit tougher in the
process.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan went out of her way to invite me.
What kind of guest doesn't finish what they're
served? Gritting my teeth, I pick up my
chopsticks once again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, but... the color appears to be draining
from your face. Are you all right?
choice_data_list: I-I'm okay! This is good stuff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please don't feel pressured to eat. The two of us
are quite capable of finishing the rest...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sure we are! I think I'm getting used to the taste
too! Still, I don't see myself forgetting about this
flavor anytime soon...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, that was fast. Did you find it to your
liking?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Would you like seconds? It looks like you can
choose between saffron rice and jade noodles as
a side, too. Which do you fancy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You will?
In that case, shall we order those for us later,
Fine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only now do I notice how perfectly comfortable
Mejiro Ardan looks as she tucks into her second
bowl of soup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incredible... The day turns out to be a special one
indeed, with my getting to witness an unexpected
toughness to Mejiro Ardan...
